arts.ttl: Official | Angelo Stiller signs new VfB Stuttgart deal with reported €40m exit clause
arts.sum: VfB Stuttgart have rewarded German international Angelo Stiller with a new contract.

arts.ttl: Stuttgart announce new deal for Stiller
arts.sum: VfB Stuttgart confirmed a contract extension for Angelo Stiller on Tuesday afternoon.

arts.ttl: VfB Stuttgart lost out on transfer to Wolves – Bundesliga club can’t compete financially
arts.sum: VfB Stuttgart were left frustrated this month after missing out on defender Emmanuel Agbadou to Wolverhampton Wanderers. That’s according to BILD, specifically their Stuttgart edition, who say the Wolves January signing was also on the German side’s transfer wish lists. arts.ttl: Nübel misses Stuttgart's final training session ahead of PSG clash
arts.sum: Alexander Nübel missed Stuttgart's training session on Tuesday and is a major doubt for Wednesday's clash with Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Man Utd, PSG Boosted as Chelsea Rule Out Pursuing €65M-Rated Juventus Frontman
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain’s decision to part ways with Randal Kolo Muani means the club will be on the lookout for a new No. 9 to pair with Gonçalo Ramos in attack, whether in January or next summer. arts.ttl: David Ornstein Reveals Update on Aston Villa’s £80M-Rated Star Amid PSG, West Ham Interest
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly keeping tabs on Aston Villa’s Jhon Durán as they aim to boost their attacking options for the future. arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been monitoring Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich closely over the past few months, with a transfer for the player nearly materializing last summer.
